{{Quote|A Xi Charrian whose name I am not even going to attempt to pronounce.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dyne]] of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]]|<ref name="loe" />}}
'''T'laalak-s'lalak-t'th'ak''' was the [[Xi Charrian/Legends|Xi Charrian]] who designed the [[Mechno-chair/Legends|holographic-projector chair]] that [[Trade Federation]] of Planets [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] used to communicate with [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].

==Biography==
During the hunt for Darth Sidious, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] tracked him down on [[Charros IV/Legends|Charros IV]] in order to learn more about the [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]] they had discovered in Gunray's palace<ref name="loe" /> on [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. They were forced to chase him through a large warehouse before they could catch him and ask questions, which he reluctantly answered. His answers furthered the Jedi's hunt for Sidious.<ref name="loe" />

==Personality and traits==
T'laalak-s'lalak-t'th'ak signed the [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidian]] engravings made by him for the mechno-chair—an act which, according to the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[TC-16]], could be interpreted by the Xi Char [[Prelate/Legends|Prelate]] as a statement of pride.<ref name="loe" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
